'''mazozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignifuge|ignifuge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignifuge|ignifuge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mazozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzezeth|mæzezeth]] || [[word:mæzezej|mæzezej]] || [[word:mæzezesh|mæzezesh]] || [[word:mæzeze|mæzeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazozozoth|mazozozoth]] || [[word:mazozozoj|mazozozoj]] || [[word:mazozozosh|mazozozosh]] || [[word:mazozozo|mazozozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazozoth|mazozoth]] || [[word:mazozoj|mazozoj]] || [[word:mazozosh|mazozosh]] || [[word:mazozo|mazozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazofzoth|mazofzoth]] || [[word:mazofzoj|mazofzoj]] || [[word:mazofzosh|mazofzosh]] || [[word:mazofzof|mazofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazozotho|mazozotho]] || [[word:mazozojo|mazozojo]] || [[word:mazozosho|mazozosho]] || [[word:mazozoko|mazozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazozoth|mazozoth]] || [[word:mazozoj|mazozoj]] || [[word:mazozosh|mazozosh]] || [[word:mazozo|mazozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazozothol|mazozothol]] || [[word:mazozojol|mazozojol]] || [[word:mazozoshol|mazozoshol]] || [[word:mazozokol|mazozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazozothotho|mazozothotho]] || [[word:mazozojojo|mazozojojo]] || [[word:mazozoshosho|mazozoshosho]] || [[word:mazozoko|mazozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazozothon|mazozothon]] || [[word:mazozojon|mazozojon]] || [[word:mazozoshon|mazozoshon]] || [[word:mazozokon|mazozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazozothoro|mazozothoro]] || [[word:mazozojoro|mazozojoro]] || [[word:mazozoshoro|mazozoshoro]] || [[word:mazozokoro|mazozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
